title: Date A Live
sourceNotes: Cumulative episodes across S1 (12) + S2 (10, eps 13-22) + S3 (12, eps 23-34) + S4 (12, eps 35-46) + S5 (12, eps 47-58) = 58 total. The Date A Live manga adaptation (id 67163) was discontinued in 2013 after ~6 chapters covering only the start of S1, so this maps to Koushi Tachibana's light novel instead (AniList id 67523, type MANGA, 146 chapters across 22 volumes). The anime adapts LN vols 1-19 by season — S1 vols 1-4, S2 vols 5-7, S3 vols 8-12, S4 vols 13-16, S5 vols 17-19 — leaving vols 20-22 (the Tohka finale) unadapted. Chapter ranges are proportional estimates converting those volume boundaries onto AniList's 146-chapter count, so they are approximate.

mappings.arc: Tohka / Yoshino / Kurumi / Kotori (S1, LN vols 1-4)
Kurumi Ragnarok / Mio Finale (S5, LN vols 17-19)
Tohka World / Tohka Good End (LN vols 20-22, unadapted)

movies.title: Date A Live: Mayuri Judgment
movies.note: Author-supervised original film (not from the light novel) introducing the spirit Mayuri; set after S2.
